title: 3. ShuiJin (1010.20) or ShuiTong (1010.19) are
text:
also effective.
JianZhong and TongTian are very good for
weakness of the legs. MuZhi is also very good.
Needling ShuiJin and ShuiTong may tonify the lung
and kidney effectively.  In case of hemiplegia,
needle MuHuo 木火 (11.10) for a good therapeutic effect. Further, MuZhi is effective for weakness of legs of
senior patients.
